source.name: Level 2: 2.3 Test Your Knowledge - name() and Domain
source.instructions: **The string returned by an action's name() method must:**

answers.answer: Match exactly what is listed under actions: in domain/basics.yml
Be the same as the filename (e.g. action_bank_hours.py)
Be unique only within the actions/ folder; domain can list anything

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT explain why name() must match the domain
source.guidance: The name() method returns the action identifier (e.g. 'action_bank_hours'). This string must match exactly what you register in domain/basics.yml under the actions: list. Rasa uses this name to find and invoke your action when a flow step references it. If they don't match, Rasa won't find your action.
